content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 25, 2005

Paul H. Chamberlain
Chamberlain, Chamberlain & Baldo
P.O. Box 32
874 Lincoln Way
Auburn, CA 95604-0032

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-052

Dear Mr. Chamberlain:

This letter confirms the receipt of your March 15, 2005, request for advice regarding unnamed clients. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you identify a specific public official and are writing as his or her authorized representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission (the “Commission”) cannot address your questions or provide an analysis. Further, the Commission declines to provide advice on hypothetical inquiries. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D).)

I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
